name: Windows DLL XML_Parse smoke
evidence: tests/native/xpact_eiffel_dll_smoke.c links through include/xpact.h and verifies XML_Parse reaches the Eiffel parser.

name: Windows native C ABI benchmark
evidence: benchmarks/xpact_native_c_benchmark.c links against build/native-eiffel/xpact.lib and records measured rows in docs/benchmarks.md.

name: test_predefined_entities
evidence: Eiffel parser regression covers predefined entity expansion and the Windows native text callback path is measured.

name: test_attributes
evidence: Eiffel parser regression covers attribute collection; native start-element callbacks pass attribute vectors for simple documents.

name: test_duplicate_cdata_attribute
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects duplicate attributes and maps the native error to XML_ERROR_DUPLICATE_ATTRIBUTE.

name: test_empty_parse
evidence: Eiffel parser maps missing document element to XML_ERROR_NO_ELEMENTS through the native bridge.

name: test_get_buffer_1
evidence: XML_GetBuffer and XML_ParseBuffer are implemented through the Eiffel runtime bridge for the Windows native path.

name: test_line_number_after_parse
evidence: Eiffel parser reports Expat-compatible end-of-parse line numbers through XML_GetCurrentLineNumber.

name: test_column_number_after_parse
evidence: Eiffel parser reports Expat-compatible end-of-parse columns through XML_GetCurrentColumnNumber.

name: test_line_number_after_error
evidence: Eiffel parser reports Expat-compatible error line numbers through XML_GetCurrentLineNumber.

name: test_column_number_after_error
evidence: Eiffel parser reports Expat-compatible error columns through XML_GetCurrentColumnNumber.

name: test_byte_info_at_end
evidence: Eiffel parser reports terminal byte index/count through XML_GetCurrentByteIndex and XML_GetCurrentByteCount.

name: test_byte_info_at_error
evidence: Eiffel parser reports error byte index/count through XML_GetCurrentByteIndex and XML_GetCurrentByteCount.

name: test_nul_byte
evidence: The Eiffel-backed native parser now accepts non-final chunks and defers tokenization until the final chunk.

name: test_good_cdata_ascii
evidence: Eiffel parser emits CDATA character data and CDATA boundary callbacks through the native bridge on chunked input.

name: test_line_and_column_numbers_inside_handlers
evidence: Eiffel parser updates line and column state immediately before start/end callback dispatch.

name: test_byte_info_at_cdata
evidence: Eiffel parser reports handler-time byte index/count and XML_GetInputContext windows through the native bridge.

name: test_pi_handled_in_default
evidence: Eiffel parser forwards raw processing-instruction tokens to the native default handler.

name: test_comment_handled_in_default
evidence: Eiffel parser forwards raw comment tokens and outside-root whitespace to the native default handler.

name: test_cdata_default
evidence: Eiffel parser forwards raw CDATA section tokens to the native default handler.

name: test_default_doctype_handler
evidence: Eiffel parser forwards doctype start/end callbacks and public/system literals to the native default handler.

name: test_dtd_default_handling
evidence: Eiffel internal-subset scanning preserves default-handler whitespace while suppressing handled DTD declarations.

name: test_dtd_attr_handling
evidence: Eiffel parser tokenizes ATTLIST declarations and forwards XML_AttlistDeclHandler callbacks for enumeration, NOTATION, CDATA, and default values.

name: test_duplicate_cdata_attribute_multiple_attlistdecl
evidence: Eiffel parser merges multiple ATTLIST declarations with first declaration winning and delivers default attributes through the native start-element callback.

name: test_duplicate_cdata_attribute_multiple_attlistdecl_2
evidence: Eiffel parser applies ATTLIST defaults per element across multiple declarations.

name: test_duplicate_cdata_attribute_multiple_attlistdecl_3
evidence: Eiffel parser preserves first-binding ATTLIST defaults when later declarations add another attribute and duplicate an existing one.

name: test_duplicate_id_attribute_multiple_attlistdecl
evidence: Eiffel parser reports explicit attribute counts and ID attribute indexes while applying default attributes through the native ABI.

name: test_ns_in_attribute_default_without_namespaces
evidence: Eiffel parser treats xmlns-prefixed default attributes as ordinary names when namespace mode is not enabled.

name: test_dtd_elements
evidence: Eiffel parser emits XML_SetElementDeclHandler callbacks and freeable XML_Content models for DTD element declarations.

name: test_dtd_elements_nesting
evidence: Eiffel parser builds Expat-compatible nested XML_Content arrays for sequence, choice, name, and quantifier content models.

name: test_public_notation_no_sysid
evidence: Eiffel parser accepts PUBLIC notation declarations without system IDs and forwards XML_NotationDeclHandler callbacks.

name: test_bad_notation
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects SYSTEM notation declarations missing a system literal with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX.

name: test_bad_public_doctype
evidence: Eiffel parser validates XML PubidChar in PUBLIC doctype identifiers and maps violations to XML_ERROR_PUBLICID.

name: test_bad_doctype
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects non-declaration content in internal subsets with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX, covering the upstream prefix-conv malformed doctype case.

name: test_bad_doctype_utf8
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects the upstream malformed UTF-8 doctype byte sequence with XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_bad_doctype_plus
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects invalid doctype names before '+' with XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_bad_doctype_star
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects invalid doctype names before '*' with XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_bad_doctype_query
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects invalid doctype names before '?' with XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_short_doctype
evidence: Eiffel parser maps a document-level end tag after a short doctype to XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_short_doctype_2
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects PUBLIC doctypes missing a public identifier with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX.

name: test_short_doctype_3
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects SYSTEM doctypes missing a system identifier with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX.

name: test_long_doctype
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects doctypes with extra external identifier content with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX.

name: test_misc_general_entities_support
evidence: Eiffel parser emits XML_EntityDeclHandler callbacks and delegates external general entity references through the native callback path.

name: test_misc_sync_entity_tolerated
evidence: Eiffel parser accepts synchronous internal entity replacement text that opens/closes nested elements and exposes the behavior through the Windows native smoke.

name: test_misc_expected_event_ptr_issue_980
evidence: Eiffel parser reports XML_GetInputContext and XML_GetCurrentByteCount for character callbacks emitted from internal entity references.

name: test_misc_async_entity_rejected
evidence: Eiffel parser rejects internal parsed entities that change the surrounding element depth and maps the native error to XML_ERROR_ASYNC_ENTITY.

name: test_misc_features
evidence: XML_GetFeatureList returns the Expat-compatible terminal list with correct XML_Char and XML_LChar size feature values.

name: test_misc_alloc_create_parser
evidence: The Windows native smoke verifies XML_ParserCreate_MM returns null when the custom allocator cannot allocate the parser object.

name: test_misc_alloc_create_parser_with_encoding
evidence: The Windows native smoke verifies XML_ParserCreate_MM allocator failure/success behavior when an explicit encoding is supplied.

name: test_ext_entity_no_handler
evidence: Eiffel native bridge skips unloaded external general entities when no external entity handler is registered and reports XML_SkippedEntityHandler callbacks.

name: test_skipped_external_entity
evidence: Eiffel native bridge reports XML_SkippedEntityHandler for unloaded external general entities without emitting character data.

name: test_ext_entity_good_cdata
evidence: Eiffel-backed XML_ExternalEntityParserCreate creates child parsers that parse external parsed entity fragments, inherit character/CDATA handlers, and emit CDATA text through the Windows DLL smoke.

name: test_user_parameters
evidence: Eiffel parser emits XML declaration, comment, skipped-entity, external-subset, and parser-as-handler-argument callbacks through the Windows DLL smoke.

name: test_ext_entity_ref_parameter
evidence: Eiffel-backed external subset callbacks honor explicit XML_SetExternalEntityRefHandlerArg values and Expat's null-argument fallback to the public C XML_Parser pointer.

name: test_xmldecl_*
evidence: Eiffel parser handles XML declaration callbacks and malformed/misplaced XML declaration diagnostics, including native XML_ERROR_MISPLACED_XML_PI and XML_ERROR_XML_DECL mapping.

name: test_wfc_undeclared_entity_*
evidence: Eiffel parser distinguishes undefined entity errors from externally-declared/skippable entities based on external subset presence and standalone='yes'.

name: test_entity_with_external_subset_unless_standalone
evidence: Eiffel parser honors XML_PARAM_ENTITY_PARSING_UNLESS_STANDALONE by skipping external subset loading for standalone='yes' and preserving XML_ERROR_UNDEFINED_ENTITY.

name: test_not_standalone_handler_reject
evidence: Eiffel parser invokes XML_NotStandaloneHandler for non-standalone external subset usage and maps handler rejection to XML_ERROR_NOT_STANDALONE through the Windows DLL smoke.

name: test_not_standalone_handler_accept
evidence: Eiffel parser continues after an accepting XML_NotStandaloneHandler, both with and without external subset loading.

name: test_set_foreign_dtd
evidence: Eiffel parser supports XML_UseForeignDTD before parsing, rejects late changes, and treats a loaded foreign DTD as an external subset for undefined-entity handling.

name: test_foreign_dtd_not_standalone
evidence: Eiffel parser invokes XML_NotStandaloneHandler before loading a configured foreign DTD and maps rejection to XML_ERROR_NOT_STANDALONE.

name: test_foreign_dtd_with_doctype
evidence: Eiffel parser combines a configured foreign DTD with an internal doctype subset while preserving internal entity expansion.

name: test_foreign_dtd_without_external_subset
evidence: Eiffel parser calls the foreign-DTD external entity handler even when the document doctype has only an internal subset.

name: test_empty_foreign_dtd
evidence: Eiffel parser keeps undefined-entity rejection when XML_UseForeignDTD is enabled but the external entity handler does not parse a DTD.

name: test_invalid_foreign_dtd
evidence: Eiffel child parsers now parse external DTD subset context explicitly and propagate invalid foreign DTD child failures as XML_ERROR_EXTERNAL_ENTITY_HANDLING.

name: test_ext_entity_not_standalone
evidence: Eiffel external parameter entity loading now invokes XML_NotStandaloneHandler in child DTD parsers and propagates rejection through the parent external entity callback.

name: test_invalid_tag_in_dtd
evidence: Eiffel external parameter entity child parsers reject element tags inside DTD subset content and propagate the nested child failure through the parent parser.

name: test_recursive_external_parameter_entity_2
evidence: Eiffel external DTD subset parsing detects recursive parameter entity replacement text while preserving first-declaration-wins duplicates.

name: test_recursive_external_parameter_entity
evidence: Eiffel external subset child parsers propagate recursive external parameter entity failures through the parent external entity callback.

name: test_undefined_ext_entity_in_external_dtd
evidence: Eiffel external subset parsing skips unresolved external parameter entities when handlers decline or are cleared, matching the covered upstream devaluer path.

name: test_dtd_stop_processing
evidence: Eiffel internal subset parsing skips an undefined parameter entity and stops later DTD declaration processing without failing the document.

name: test_external_bom_consumed
evidence: Eiffel input normalization strips a UTF-8 BOM before external DTD subset tokenization, including when the native input is split across non-final/final calls.

name: test_external_entity_values
evidence: Eiffel external DTD child parsers now validate XML text declarations, partial UTF-8 tails, unterminated literals, recursive parameter entity context, and successful BOM/ATTLIST value cases through the Windows DLL smoke.

name: test_ext_entity_trailing_*
evidence: Eiffel external parsed entity fragments now deliver trailing character data and report XML_ERROR_ASYNC_ENTITY for fragments ending inside an open element.

name: test_ext_entity_invalid_parse
evidence: Eiffel external parsed entity fragments now report XML_ERROR_UNCLOSED_TOKEN for bare markup starts and XML_ERROR_PARTIAL_CHAR for incomplete UTF-8 tails.

name: test_ext_entity_set_*
evidence: Eiffel external parsed entity children now accept text declarations with encoding-only form when XML_SetEncoding supplies UTF-8, including BOM-prefixed input.

name: test_ext_entity_bad_encoding*
evidence: Eiffel-backed external entity child parsers now report XML_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ENCODING for unsupported explicit encodings on general and parameter entity children.

name: test_ext_entity_latin1_*
evidence: Eiffel native input decoding now honors explicit ISO-8859-1 on external entity child parsers, including UTF-16-looking BOM bytes as character data.

name: test_ext_entity_utf16_*
evidence: Eiffel native input decoding now covers external entity child parser UTF-16 endian overrides and rejects UTF-16-looking bytes without an explicit UTF-16 signal.

name: test_ext_entity_utf8_non_bom
evidence: Eiffel external parsed entity fragments now treat the not-quite UTF-8 BOM byte sequence as ordinary UTF-8 character data.

name: test_bom_utf16_*
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding now accepts UTF-16 BOM-prefixed documents and feeds the existing UTF-8 tokenizer.

name: test_nobom_utf16_le
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding now recognizes little-endian UTF-16 documents without a BOM from the initial token shape.

name: test_utf16
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding converts UTF-16 character data, including non-ASCII BMP content, to the existing UTF-8 handler path.

name: test_utf16_le_epilog_newline
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding handles chunked UTF-16LE input before final parse.

name: test_not_utf16
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding now reports XML_ERROR_INCORRECT_ENCODING when a UTF-8 byte stream declares UTF-16.

name: test_good_cdata_utf16*
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding feeds UTF-16 CDATA sections through the existing CDATA tokenizer.

name: test_long_cdata_utf16
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding supports long UTF-16 CDATA payloads through XML_ParseBuffer.

name: test_multichar_cdata_utf16
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding converts UTF-16 surrogate pairs to UTF-8 before character-data callbacks.

name: test_bad_cdata_utf16
evidence: Eiffel native UTF-16 decoding and markup classification now match upstream unclosed-token, unclosed-CDATA, and partial-character diagnostics for malformed CDATA prefixes.

name: test_utf16_bad_surrogate_pair
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding rejects malformed UTF-16 surrogate structure as XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_utf16*_pi
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding feeds UTF-16 processing instructions through the existing PI callback path.

name: test_utf16*_comment
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding feeds UTF-16 comments through the existing comment callback path.

name: test_utf16*_attr*
evidence: Eiffel UTF-8 name scanning now accepts continuation bytes, allowing decoded UTF-16 non-ASCII attribute names and values through the normal attribute path.

name: test_entity_in_utf16_*_attr
evidence: Eiffel native parser input decoding feeds UTF-16 attribute character references through the existing attribute-value normalization path.

name: test_ignore_section_utf16*
evidence: Eiffel DTD subset parsing now recognizes UTF-16 conditional IGNORE sections and forwards their skipped markup through the default handler.

name: test_utf16_pe
evidence: Eiffel DTD subset parsing now accepts UTF-16 parameter entity names and reports their declarations through XML_EntityDeclHandler.

name: test_entity_public_utf16_*
evidence: Eiffel external parameter entity child parsers now merge parsed DTD declarations back into the parent, including UTF-16BE/LE public parameter entity callbacks.

name: test_bad_attr_desc_keyword_utf16
evidence: Eiffel DTD subset parsing now rejects UTF-16 invalid ATTLIST default keywords with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX.

name: test_bad_doctype_utf16
evidence: Eiffel DTD subset parsing now rejects UTF-16 invalid internal-subset content with XML_ERROR_SYNTAX.

name: test_misc_utf16le
evidence: Parser creation with explicit UTF-16LE now decodes native input before Eiffel tokenization.

name: test_misc_create_external_entity_parser_with_null_context
evidence: The Windows native smoke verifies XML_ExternalEntityParserCreate accepts a null context and frees the Eiffel-backed child parser.

name: test_hash*
evidence: Eiffel-owned native parser hash salt setters reject null arguments and parsing-after-start changes while preserving successful parsing for collision-heavy documents.

name: test_bad_encoding
evidence: Eiffel-owned explicit encoding state accepts unsupported names before parsing and reports XML_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ENCODING during parse.

name: test_explicit_encoding
evidence: Eiffel-owned explicit encoding state accepts UTF-8 before parse, rejects mid-parse changes, and allows reset after parsing finishes.

name: test_unknown_encoding*
evidence: Eiffel-owned native decoding now calls the public unknown-encoding handler, validates Expat map contracts, runs two-byte converters, preserves handler user data, and maps converter failures through XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_unknown_ascii_encoding*
evidence: Unknown-encoding ASCII-like maps now pass ASCII input and reject top-bit bytes with XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN before Eiffel tokenization.

name: test_unrecognised_encoding_internal_entity
evidence: Unknown-encoding handler rejection now maps to XML_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ENCODING.

name: test_missing_encoding_conversion_fn
evidence: Unknown-encoding maps that require conversion but omit convert() now fail with XML_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ENCODING.

name: test_failing_encoding_conversion_fn
evidence: Unknown-encoding convert() failures now map to XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN.

name: test_invalid_unknown_encoding
evidence: Invalid unknown-encoding maps are validated before tokenization and map to XML_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ENCODING.

name: test_misc_no_infinite_loop_issue_1161
evidence: Eiffel external DTD child parsers now propagate nested external parameter entity child failures through the parent as XML_ERROR_EXTERNAL_ENTITY_HANDLING.

name: test_renter_loop_finite_content
evidence: Eiffel external parsed entity children now import parent DTD entity context, so nested internal entity expansion inside loaded external entity content is finite and matches upstream.

name: test_stop_parser_between_char_data_calls
evidence: Eiffel callback dispatch now observes XML_StopParser abort requests and maps character-data aborts to XML_ERROR_ABORTED.

name: test_suspend_parser_between_char_data_calls
evidence: Eiffel callback dispatch now observes resumable XML_StopParser requests and rejects direct parsing while suspended with XML_ERROR_SUSPENDED.

name: test_repeated_stop_parser_between_char_data_calls
evidence: The native Eiffel-backed stop state now handles repeated abort/suspend calls made from the same character-data callback.

name: test_stop_parser_between_cdata_calls
evidence: Eiffel CDATA character callbacks now honor non-resumable stop requests and report XML_ERROR_ABORTED.

name: test_suspend_parser_between_cdata_calls
evidence: Eiffel CDATA character callbacks now honor resumable stop requests and report XML_STATUS_SUSPENDED.

name: test_ext_entity_value_abort
evidence: External entity child parsers now propagate XML declaration callback aborts as XML_ERROR_ABORTED without failing the accepting parent callback.

name: test_subordinate_xdecl_suspend
evidence: External entity child parser XML declaration callbacks now surface resumable suspension status through the native ABI.

name: test_suspend_xdecl
evidence: XML declaration callbacks can suspend the parser and subsequent direct parse calls fail with XML_ERROR_SUSPENDED.

name: test_abort_epilog_2
evidence: Default-handler epilog callbacks can abort on normalized line-feed epilog text and map to XML_ERROR_ABORTED.

name: test_suspend_epilog
evidence: Default-handler epilog callbacks can suspend the parser and return XML_STATUS_SUSPENDED.

name: test_abort_epilog
evidence: Eiffel native default-handler replay preserves the raw carriage-return epilog stop path and maps it to XML_ERROR_ABORTED.

name: test_default_current
evidence: Eiffel DTD default-token replay and XML_DefaultCurrent callback text now match the upstream internal-entity cases.

name: test_suspend_in_sole_empty_tag
evidence: End-element callbacks on an empty document element can suspend and resume without native state corruption.

name: test_empty_element_abort
evidence: Start-element callbacks on an empty document element can abort through XML_StopParser.

name: test_misc_stop*
evidence: Eiffel-backed stop state now passes the upstream misc stop-during-end-handler and unstarted-stop rejection checks.

name: test_misc_resumeparser_not_crashing
evidence: XML_ResumeParser on the current native state no longer crashes after a pre-parse buffer/stop sequence.

name: test_misc_char_handler_stop_without_leak
evidence: Character-data stop requests during internal entity expansion are observed without native handler lifetime regressions.

name: test_resume_invalid_parse
evidence: XML_ResumeParser now re-enters the Eiffel parse path for character-data suspensions and propagates the retained syntax error.

name: test_resume_resuspended
evidence: XML_ResumeParser now re-enters the Eiffel parse path for character-data suspensions and can surface a second suspension before final completion.

name: test_set_reparse_deferral_on_null_parser
evidence: The public reparse-deferral setter now rejects null parser handles like libexpat.

name: test_subordinate_suspend
evidence: Subordinate external-parameter parser suspension now returns XML_ERROR_SUSPEND_PE through the native ABI.

name: test_ext_entity_invalid_suspended_parse
evidence: External entity child parsers now suspend on XML declaration callbacks, resume, and propagate final child parse errors as XML_ERROR_EXTERNAL_ENTITY_HANDLING.

name: test_suspend_resume_internal_entity
evidence: Resume replay now suppresses already-delivered Eiffel callbacks and continues through internal entity expansion without duplicating user-visible events.

name: test_suspend_resume_internal_entity_issue_629
evidence: Non-final prefix parsing now reaches complete internal-entity comment callbacks before final input and resumes without corrupting later buffer fills.

name: test_resume_entity_with_syntax_error
evidence: Resume replay through an internal entity now preserves the retained entity syntax error and reports XML_ERROR_TAG_MISMATCH.

name: test_suspend_resume_parameter_entity
evidence: Parameter-entity declaration callbacks can suspend, resume, and continue to document character data through the Eiffel parser path.

name: test_nested_entity_suspend
evidence: Nested internal entity comment callbacks can repeatedly suspend and resume while preserving accumulated callback data.

name: test_nested_entity_suspend_2
evidence: Nested internal entity character-data callbacks can repeatedly suspend and resume while preserving accumulated callback data.

name: test_siphash_self
evidence: The upstream SipHash self-test passes through the libexpat adapter build.

name: test_siphash_spec
evidence: The upstream SipHash specification vector passes through the libexpat adapter build.

name: test_set_reparse_deferral
evidence: Eiffel-owned non-final parsing now remembers incomplete large tokens and delays newly discovered callbacks until the reparse-deferral threshold is met.

name: test_reparse_deferral_is_inherited
evidence: External parameter-entity child parsers inherit the native reparse-deferral policy and apply the same Eiffel-side delayed callback release.

name: test_set_reparse_deferral_on_the_fly
evidence: Disabling reparse deferral on a live parser releases the deferred Eiffel callback stream on the next non-final parse.

name: test_accounting_precision
evidence: Upstream accounting precision semantics are not implemented behind the Windows native ABI.

name: test_billion_laughs_attack_protection_api
evidence: Billion-laughs attack-protection setters now enforce null parser, child parser, NaN, and lower-bound contracts through the native ABI.

name: test_amplification_isolated_external_parser
evidence: Eiffel native parse state now rejects external-entity input once configured amplification limits are reached.

name: test_alloc_*
evidence: Upstream allocation-failure injection exercises C allocator hook exhaustion; Eiffel parser storage is Eiffel-managed and not a programmer-visible allocation contract.

name: test_nsalloc_*
evidence: Namespace allocation-failure injection exercises C allocator hook exhaustion; Eiffel parser storage is Eiffel-managed and not a programmer-visible allocation contract.

name: test_*
evidence: Namespace parsing, namespace declaration callbacks, namespace triplets, and namespace error mapping pass through the Eiffel-backed bridge.

name: test_misc_attribute_leak
evidence: Attribute lifetime/leak regression row passes through the Eiffel-backed native bridge under the upstream adapter.

name: test_bypass_heuristic_when_close_to_bufsize
evidence: Reparse deferral/buffer heuristic behavior is not implemented.

name: test_varying_buffer_fills
evidence: Reparse deferral/buffer heuristic behavior is not implemented.
